CONTENT.Career: Stabile started his senior career with Inter Milan.On 11 July 2024, Stabile joined Serie C club Alcione on a season-long loan.
CONTENT.Early life: Stabile joined the youth academy of Italian Serie A side Inter at the age of nine.
CONTENT.Personal life: Stabile has regarded Italy international Alessandro Bastoni as his football idol.
CONTENT.Style of play: Stabile mainly operates as a defender and is left-footed.

SUMMARY: Giacomo Stabile (born 18 April 2005) is an Italian footballer who plays as a defender for Serie C club Alcione, on loan from Serie A club Inter Milan.
